reviews.review_description: terrible game it's literally just a gorilla tag clone the grenades you use in this game are absolutely terrible they get you nowhere really wish they would just put some thought into it and not just thinking oh it's a gorilla tag clone so it must do good i'm actually tired of this this is what vr is turning into it and it's very sad DONT EVEN TRY IT

My friends and I got to play this game recently as we were scrolling through newly released games and found this! It is honestly really cool, and there are almost like different game modes you can play (my favorite is where you can play soccer). Nonetheless, I 100% recommend it to anyone, especially with friends.
